overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage in Unreal Engine 5 showing a female character exploring a sunlit institutional plaza with a large curved building featuring tall glass windows. The character walks along paved terraces, descends to a sunken garden level, and returns to examine the building's facade up close.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace plaza with curved institutional building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved terrace with the curved building facade on the right side and metal railings on the left

entered.detail: large curved institutional building with stone facade and tall vertical windows
black metal railing along the edge of the upper terrace
light-colored stone tiles with geometric patterns
classical-style building visible in the background beyond the trees
green leafy trees lining the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit upper terrace with a massive curved building dominating the right side. Black metal railings line the left edge overlooking a lower level, while geometric stone tiles cover the ground. The sky is partly cloudy and the scene is devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to sunken garden

events.description: character begins descending wide stone stairs to the lower garden level

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the wide stone stairs toward the sunken garden area below

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with multiple steps connecting the terrace levels
lower landscaped level with greenery and trees visible below the railing
stone wall supporting the upper terrace structure

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide stone staircase to a lower garden level, with the curved building now visible from a higher angle in the distance. The sunken garden with its greenery becomes visible to the left as the character moves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower garden walkway with tree-lined perimeter

events.description: character turns around and begins ascending stairs back to the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower path then turning to ascend the stairs back to the upper terrace level

entered.detail: paved path at the lower garden level running parallel to the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the lower garden walkway surrounded by trees, then turns to face the building and begins ascending the stairs back to the upper level. The perspective shifts to show the building facade more directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance plaza with tall glass facade

events.description: character stops in front of the tall glass windows to observe the building facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the imposing building facade with tall vertical windows and coming to a halt to observe the architecture

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling vertical glass windows reflecting the sky on the building facade
massive stone columns framing the glass entrance of the building

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the upper terrace and approaches the building's imposing facade up close, stopping to face the tall vertical glass windows and massive stone columns. The geometric pavement patterns are visible at the character's feet as she stands still before the architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit institutional plaza, transitioning from a high terrace down into a sunken garden before returning to the building's imposing facade. It begins with the character walking along an upper terrace of geometric stone tiles, flanked by black metal railings and a massive curved building. As the character descends a wide stone staircase, the perspective shifts to reveal a lush sunken garden to the left while the building recedes into the distance. The scene then follows the character along the garden walkway through surrounding greenery before she turns and ascends the stairs, bringing the architecture directly back into focus. Finally, the camera approaches the building's facade up close, coming to a halt before the towering vertical glass windows and massive stone columns.
